report.summary: Automated community growth cycle: drafted 3 new social posts (#148: AI Agent Frameworks thread, #149: RWA Platforms comparison, #150: Thu Convergence Eve primer), newsletter v26 section on AI agents + RWA convergence, created 1 SVG social card (ai-agents-rwa dual-panel). Top content: Fear & Greed Timeline (+95%), Options Calculator (+93%), ETF guides (+92%), with AI Agent Frameworks and RWA Platforms queued as next high-growth content.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #148 — THREAD (4 parts): AI Agent Frameworks Comparison. Hook: 'AI agents are about to change how you interact with DeFi.' Covers Autonolas, Fetch.ai, Virtuals, CreatorBid, ElizaOS, ERC-8183 standard. CTA to /learn/ai-agent-frameworks-comparison-2026. Scheduled: Wed Mar 25 9PM ET.

Tweet #149: RWA Platforms Showdown. Hook: 'Real World Assets hit $15B+ in crypto TVL.' Compares Ondo, Centrifuge, Maple, Goldfinch across yield, security, regulatory status. CTA to /learn/rwa-platforms-comparison-2026. Scheduled: Thu Mar 26 12PM ET.

Tweet #150: Thu Convergence Eve. Hook: 'Tomorrow is the biggest single day for crypto in 2026.' Preview of $14B options expiry + 91 ETF rulings. CTAs to options-calculator, ETF guide, fear-greed-timeline. Scheduled: Wed Mar 25 10PM ET.
Discord/TG Announcement: Two new comparison guides (AI Agent Frameworks + RWA Platforms) plus Thursday convergence primer.

Newsletter v26 section: 'The AI Agent Wave Meets the RWA Boom' — two narrative convergence, Thursday catalysts, 531 published pages milestone. Subject: 'AI Agents + RWA Platforms: Two Narratives Colliding This Week'
Content calendar: 6 posts Wed Mar 25 through Mon Mar 31 across Twitter, Discord/TG, Email

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: AI Agents × RWA Platforms — Dual glass-morphism panels, left panel (indigo) for AI Agent Frameworks with 8 platforms badge, right panel (amber) for RWA Platforms with $15B TVL and 3-12% yield badges. Headline: 'Two Narratives. One Week.' Brand gradient accents, 1200x630 Twitter card format. Path: reports/social-cards/2026-03-25-social-card-ai-agents-rwa.svg
